meta.title: Léo Sauvey — Freelance Developer | Websites, Apps, Custom Software
meta.description: Freelance developer based in Caen, France. I design and deliver tailored websites, apps and software. Remote-friendly.

hero.title: LÉO SAUVEY
hero.tagline: Freelance developer. I design and deliver tailored websites, apps and software.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm 21, currently in my third year at Supinfo engineering school. Based between Caen and Cherbourg in France, I work on-site or fully remote — whichever fits the project best.
about.p2: I design and build websites, apps and custom software. The idea behind every engagement: ship a tool that actually saves time, or unlocks a real opportunity for the team or the client.
about.p3: Detail-driven, a careful listener to what isn't said out loud, invested in every project as if it were my own. Off-keyboard: sport, good food, real conversations — I think we always do better work on the things we genuinely care about.

stack.title: Main stack
stack.subtitle: The tech I use day-to-day. I touch others, but these I really master.

contact.title: Let's work together?
contact.subtitle: A project, an idea, a question. Email is the simplest way.
